planSummary: Manual QA walkthrough for Services list/create/edit/delete per docs/superpowers/qa/services.md (2026-04-17).
runSummary: Chrome DevTools MCP session on localhost:5103 against backend localhost:5100. Seed: 3 services, 0 categories.

cases.text: Navigate to /services. Expect 200 response, breadcrumbs, PageHeader, StatsGrid with 4 cards, FilterBar, DataTable, no console errors.
Expect a single stats request. Observed: 2 separate list calls used to compute Total/Active — spec divergence.
Spec §2: PageHeader must show [Export outline] [+ Add primary]. Only Add button is present.
Type 5 chars. Expect ≤1 request after settling. Observed: 5 requests (one per keystroke).

cases.summary: Status filter 'inactive' sends isActive=false and filters rows
cases.text: Select 'غير نشطة' → request includes isActive=false AND response contains only inactive services. Observed: request correct, response still returns 3 active services.
After selecting 'all', no isActive param should appear in request.
Expect categories in dropdown. Observed: empty due to 0 seeded categories (blocks create form too).

cases.summary: Reset button clears filters and refetches
cases.text: Click إعادة تعيين. Expect all filters reset.

cases.summary: Price column displays API value in SAR
cases.text: API returns price '120' SAR. UI must show '120.00 ر.س'. Observed: '1.20 ر.س' (value divided by 100).
Click view icon. Expect sheet with nameAr/nameEn/category/price/duration/booking settings/dates and Edit footer button.

cases.summary: Create form — empty submit shows validation errors
cases.text: Submit with empty fields. Expect 'الاسم (AR) مطلوب' / 'الاسم (EN) مطلوب' / 'يرجى اختيار الفئة'. Observed: errors shown but AR/EN errors are English 'Required'.
Click 'التسعير وأنواع الحجز' tab. Expect Pricing panel to render. Observed: tab does not switch; price/duration inputs unreachable.

cases.summary: Create form — user can submit a new service end-to-end
cases.text: Fill names, category, price, duration → submit → redirect to /services. Blocked by missing categories + broken tab switching.

cases.summary: Edit form — loads existing service via GET /services/:id
cases.text: Navigate to /services/<id>/edit. Expect prefilled form. Observed: backend returns 404 for /services/:id; UI renders 'الخدمة غير موجودة'.

cases.summary: Delete dialog shows service name in description
cases.text: Click delete icon. Expect dialog description to include the specific service name. Observed: generic message with no name.
Dialog must state the action is non-recoverable. Observed: 'لا يمكن التراجع عن هذا الإجراء' present.
list_console_messages filtered to error/warn returns empty.
